You'd get your dead body and you'd lay it out on a table and then you'd wash it
and then you'd start by removing the brain and then they would cut open down the middle of the
body and they would take out anything that they thought would rot and then they would cover it
in salt and dry it out and then they would wrap it in bandages and then that would be a mummy.

Humans vs Cows 2D.
